description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product Details Gold and blue printed bag with one main zippered compartmentShimmer fabric near mouth of the bagZippered pocket at backInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketButton up detail at side of the bagTwo short handles for carrying ease with ribbon detailMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 26 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 26 cm
